skills.name: uiux-phase-router
skills.description: Routes UI/UX work into discover, define, visualize, architect, plan, implement, verify, release with explicit DoR/DoD.

skills.name: operator-task-corpus-builder
skills.description: Extracts jobs-to-be-done, decisions, pain points, quick actions, and drill-down needs from a request and current system state.

skills.name: intent-normalizer
skills.description: Converts a feature or upgrade request into a bounded UI/UX objective, in-scope objects, non-goals, and measurable success outcomes.

skills.name: object-model-extractor
skills.description: Defines first-class objects, their relationships, and the declared-vs-observed authority boundary for each object.

skills.name: view-registry-selector
skills.description: Assigns each object and operator question to the best view: graph, board, timeline, diff, form, inspector, evidence drawer, or chat.

skills.name: layout-shell-composer
skills.description: Designs the shell layout, navigation rails, toolbar/command palette, dockable panels, and saved layouts.

skills.name: interaction-contract-writer
skills.description: Specifies click, keyboard, drag, hover, selection, compare, pop-out, and chat behaviors with valid actions per state.

skills.name: motion-feedback-spec
skills.description: Defines transitions, loading states, status changes, toggle behavior, and reduced-motion rules.

skills.name: quick-action-prioritizer
skills.description: Ranks quick actions by frequency, urgency, and recovery impact and chooses where they must be visible.

skills.name: drilldown-path-designer
skills.description: Designs stable paths from ecosystem overview to subsystem, module, pseudocode, diff, work order, run, and evidence.

skills.name: platform-adaptation-planner
skills.description: Maps the shared object model and interaction contract onto web/desktop, iOS, and Android without false parity.

skills.name: accessibility-scenario-tester
skills.description: Evaluates keyboard/focus/motion/target-size/semantic issues and verifies recovery paths for disabled, screen reader, and low-precision inputs.

skills.name: ux-scenario-tester
skills.description: Runs outcome-based scenario tests such as reachability, state comprehension, safe launch, and failure recovery.

skills.name: ux-evidence-collector
skills.description: Collects repo grounding, prototype screenshots, scenario results, telemetry, accessibility results, and release evidence into one bundle.

skills.name: design-system-diff-checker
skills.description: Detects token drift, inconsistent component states, naming collisions, and motion/accessibility deviations across surfaces.

skills.name: work-order-chunker
skills.description: Converts architecture into bounded UI/UX work orders with file scope, dependencies, acceptance criteria, and verification commands.
